arts.ttl: 0 points from 4 games - Could Everton finally be relegated from the Premier League this season?
arts.sum: After 132 years at their beloved Goodison Park, Everton will have a new home next season. The new 'Everton Stadium' on the Bramley-Moore Dock is set to be the home ground for the Toffees from...

arts.ttl: Former Everton chief executive makes John Textor and Dan Friedkin takeover claim
arts.sum: Former chief executive Keith Wyness believes prospective owners John Textor and Dan Friedkin could be "a good team" together at Everton

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton and Paul Merson repeat same Everton warning in Leicester City prediction
arts.sum: Leicester City will be seeking to bounce back from disappointment last weekend in their upcoming clash with Everton, though pundits are warning their winless opponents are more dangerous than presumed. Heaping the pressure on Everton, he finished by stating: "Another defeat, especially against another side from down the bottom of the table, would not go down well," before locking in a 2-1 win for the away side as his prediction.

arts.ttl: Seven right-backs, three comebacks and no points: Unpacking Everton’s disastrous season so far
arts.sum: Sean Dyche’s teams are meant to be stubborn, resolute and hard to break down. So why are Everton shipping goals and giving up commanding leads so readily?

arts.ttl: Everton will have to be ruthless and avoid the unthinkable this weekend
arts.sum: Our Everton fans' jury are back as they give their opinions on the upcoming Premier League game against Leicester City

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche proud of Everton record and keen to build on it as club chiefs keep support
arts.sum: Sean Dyche stressed the importance of understanding the context in which he was operating as he spoke of his pride at the work he had done at Everton, where he retains the support of senior figures following a tough start to the campaign

arts.ttl: Steve Cooper slams 'awful error' after 'false' Leicester City VAR decision as referee meeting held
arts.sum: Leicester City were the victims of an "awful human error" in their 2-2 draw at Crystal Palace with the club forwarding footage to the Premier League that manager Steve Cooper believes shows proof of an incorrect VAR decision. But Cooper says the Premier League stopped the footage at the wrong time, after Mitchell had crossed the ball.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche responds to Everton boo boys with honest verdict on time in charge
arts.sum: A growing number of fans are losing patience with Sean Dyche because of their pointless start and he has answered them back with this assessment of his Everton reign

arts.ttl: Intermediary confirms Mangala wanted Fiorentina before Everton
arts.sum: The transfer intermediary who worked on the Orel Mangala move confirms the player ‘said yes...

arts.ttl: Everton injury and illness latest: Sean Dyche delivers update on 10 players
arts.sum: Everton boss Sean Dyche delivers an extensive fitness update on 10 first-team players, including Jarrad Brathwaite, ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.
